name: Kolej Matrikulasi Kedah (KMK) — Digital Twin Campus
source: OpenStreetMap (way/relation extract, way IDs preserved) — Persiaran Kayu Manis · Jalan Pelaga · Jalan Cengkih · Jalan Bunga Lawang
